GDD-gdd-overview-v2-elemental-hunter.md.notes: Master game overview for Elemental Hunter. Contains full game spec (board, tokens, turn structure, combos, combat, artifacts, levels). NOT a feature-specific GDD — requires breaking into individual feature GDDs (GDD-FEATURE-*.md) for agent_dev implementation.

ladder-mechanic.js.notes: Implemented from former GDD-FEATURE-ladder-mechanic.md. Test skeleton at src/tests/ladder-mechanic.test.js. Source GDD files (GDD-ladder-mechanic.md, GDD-FEATURE-ladder-mechanic.md) were removed by anh on 2026-03-18 as legacy. Implementation remains active unless anh decides to remove it.
